shopping_285.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE: The task required ordering the item, but the agent only added it to the cart and did not proceed to checkout to complete the order.
shopping_285.REFLECTION: In the future, after adding an item to the cart, I must proceed to the checkout process to fully "order" the item as requested by the objective. I should look for a "checkout" or "cart" icon/link and follow the steps to finalize the purchase.
shopping_285.raw_response:
POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
The task required ordering the item, but the agent only added it to the cart and did not proceed to checkout to complete the order.

REFLECTION:
In the future, after adding an item to the cart, I must proceed to the checkout process to fully "order" the item as requested by the objective. I should look for a "checkout" or "cart" icon/link and follow the steps to finalize the purchase.
